creator: exploringlondon
caption:
The world’s first immersive video gaming experience is in London! This is Boom Lab London @boomlab_experience where you’ll take on 5 insane challenges, with games like the floor is lava, a laser room, target shooting and more! Will you succeed?

🎟️ Tickets from £22.90 per person, save 10% on your tickets on @fever_uk with code EXPLORINGLONDON10
⏰ Duration 75 mins
🧑‍🧒‍🧒 Perfect for groups between 2-8 people, and ages 12+
📍 83 Rivington St, London EC2A 3AY

#feverambassador

transcription.text: This is the world's first immersive video game experience, and it's one of the most fun new activities in London. This is Boom Lab, and it will put your team's communication coordination and decision-making skills to the test. You'll take part in five games, each one in a different room lasting 10 minutes. In each game, you're trying to get as many lives as you can for the final challenge, and that means jumping across platforms in the real floor is lava game, dodging lasers in the laser room, smashing glowing targets as you're solving puzzles, and so many more fast-paced challenges that will make you sweat, all in the lead-up to that final challenge. And that final challenge is Kaboom, where you're deactivating bombs fast without making mistakes, because if you fail, that paint bomb will explode. It's the perfect group activity. Now we've got a 10% off discount code. Find all the details in the caption.
